tagline: Your First Step to Financial Freedom Starts Here
hero_subtitle: Chicago real estate and bankruptcy attorney with 10+ years of experience. We help families save their homes, eliminate debt, and build a brighter financial future.
service_area_description: Serving Chicago, Downers Grove, Naperville, and surrounding Chicagoland suburbs.
seo_title: Waite Law Firm | Real Estate & Bankruptcy Attorney in Chicago, IL
seo_description: Waite Law Firm in Chicago, IL. 10+ years of experience in real estate, bankruptcy, foreclosure, and loan modification. Free consultation available.
services_subtitle: Real estate, bankruptcy, foreclosure, and loan modification — handled with care and expertise.
reviews_subtitle: Real results from real people across Chicago and the suburbs.
cta_heading: Facing foreclosure or drowning in debt?
cta_subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation consultation. We'll map out your options and help you take the first step.
footer_description: Chicago-based real estate and bankruptcy law firm helping families protect their homes and build financial freedom.

services_featured.name: Real Estate Law
services_featured.description: Buy, sell, or refinance with confidence. We handle closings, title issues, and disputes to protect your biggest investment.

services_secondary.name: Bankruptcy
services_secondary.description: Chapter 7 or Chapter 13 — we determine the best path to eliminate debt and give you a fresh financial start.

services_accent.name: Foreclosure Defense
services_accent.description: Don't lose your home. We fight foreclosure proceedings and explore every option to keep you in your house.

services_wide.name: Loan Modification
services_wide.description: Our proven system makes getting legal help affordable. We negotiate with lenders to reduce your payments and save your home.

about_features.title: Attorney Ryan Waite
about_features.description: Founder and lead attorney. Member of Chicago Bar Association, Illinois Bar Association, DuPage County Bar Association, and American Bar Association.

about_features.title: Affordable & Transparent
about_features.description: Reasonable rates, honest services, no hidden fees, no games. We developed a system to make legal help affordable for everyone.

about_features.title: Constant Communication
about_features.description: We keep you informed every step of the way. Phone, text, or email — you'll always know the status of your case.

reviews.name: Balkrishna B.
reviews.text: Ryan always talks with me respectfully and friendly. He responds as soon as possible by phone, text, or email. He did all my requirements in one place and saved my home with affordable fees.

reviews.name: Manny G.
reviews.text: Attorney Ryan Waite did an excellent job in my bankruptcy case. His advice not only prevented incarceration on another issue, but it also helped save lots of money!

reviews.name: Satisfied Client
reviews.text: The Waite Law Firm handled our real estate closing with professionalism and attention to detail. They made the entire process stress-free and affordable.
